# Support

## Getting Help

Before opening a question, review the [README](../README.md), [contribution guide](../.creatorforge/CONTRIBUTING.md), and [AI knowledge base](../.creatorforge/AI_MEMORY.md).

## Questions and Ideas

Use the Question issue template for setup or usage questions. Use the Feature Request template for creator-facing ideas.

## Security Issues

Do not report vulnerabilities publicly. Follow the [Security Policy](SECURITY.md).
